name: Breakfast Sausage Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 loaves frozen white bread dough, thawed
recipeInstructions:
1. Allow the dough to rise until nearly doubled in size.
2. Meanwhile, cook and crumble the sausage in a skillet over medium heat. Add mushrooms and onion. Cook and stir until the sausage is browned and vegetables are tender; let cool.
3. Beat 1 egg and set aside.
4. To the sausage mixture, add the remaining eggs, cheese, and seasonings; mix well.
5. Roll each loaf of dough into a rectangle measuring 16x12 inches.
6. Spread half the sausage mixture on each loaf, keeping it within 1 inch of the edges.
7. Roll the loaves jelly-roll style, starting at a narrow end, and seal the edges.
8. Place the rolls on a greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 350 degrees for 25 minutes, brushing with beaten egg.
10. Continue baking for 5-10 more minutes or until golden brown.
11. Serve warm. Yield: 2 loaves
